title: task-success bench result file (Phase B output)
description: Formalizes the shape harness/task_runner.py's main() already writes to harness/results/tasks-run-<modeltag>-<utcts>.json (gitignored runtime artifacts - see harness/README.md and .gitignore; this schema documents the shape, it does not make the files tracked). Derived by reading task_runner.py's main() (top-level object construction) and run_one_scenario()/classify() (per-row 'results' entries) - no field invented. Validated by harness/tasks/validate_schemas.py.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC run timestamp, time.strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ') - also embedded in the output filename.

tier.description: The --tier value the run was invoked with (main()'s parse_args() default is fixture).

authored_from.description: Path to the Phase A authored-*.json this run consumed (--authored).

model_tag.description: Model tag carried through from the authored-*.json's own model_tag field ('unknown' if absent).

extension_dir.description: Path to the unpacked lfl-terminal extension directory the run loaded (runner.py's EXTENSION_DIR).

n_total.description: Total row count, including harness_error rows.

n_harness_error.description: Count of rows with bucket == harness_error - excluded from the task_success denominator (design doc section 6 / FIX 4a in task_runner.py).

n_rated.description: n_total - n_harness_error. The actual task_success denominator.

n_success.description: Count of rows with success == true. task_success rate = n_success / n_rated.

buckets.description: Histogram of non-null bucket values across all rows (one key per bucket string seen, integer count). Keys are a subset of the bucket enum in the result_row definition below.

results.description: One entry per scenario attempted, in scenario order.

resolved_source.description: How `success` on this row was determined. harness_checks = this file's own automated success-check evaluation (evaluate_checks()/classify() in task_runner.py) - every row task_runner.py writes stamps this value. owner_judged = a human reviewed the evidence and set success by hand. external = success came from some other, non-harness system's report. OPTIONAL and absent on any result file produced before 2026-07-17 (the field did not exist yet - see harness/README.md's task-success section and RESULTS-TASKS.md's note); harness/tasks/validate_schemas.py only warns, never fails, on a missing resolved_source. Conceptually required on every result file produced from 2026-07-17 onward: a success boolean must always carry HOW it was determined, so a future manually-judged or externally-reported row can never masquerade as harness-verified.

start_url.description: The fixture/realsite start URL the page navigated to. Absent on an invalid_author row (no script was ever run) or if the scenario's own try block raised before this was set.

state.description: Raw execution outcome from watch_run()/run_seeded_script(), or invalid_author/harness_error assigned by the caller. Feeds classify() together with expect_pause and checks_ok to produce success/bucket.

success.description: True only when the first valid script reached completed (or paused, for expect_pause goals), every success check passed, and any declared min_steps_executed floor was met (classify(), FIX 2 in task_runner.py).

bucket.description: Null only when success is true. See classify() in task_runner.py and harness/README.md's 'Scoring buckets' paragraph for the full, mutually-exclusive definition of each value, including the FIX 1a go-step reclassification of a genuine product halted into fell_to_model.

nav_confirms.description: Count of pendingNav cards approved (Enter pressed) during the run - watch_run()'s nav_confirms counter.

steps_executed.description: watch_run()'s steps_dispatched change-detector count on lastResult - a polling-based floor, not necessarily exact (see harness/README.md's min_steps_executed discussion for known undercounting on fast local pages).

run_verdict.description: The product's own in-band run verdict from the dev-gated test hook (lastRunVerdict: {name, ok, outcome, stepsTotal, stepIndex}), or null when absent (older extension build, or a run that never reached a verdict emission point). Present as a key only on rows written by run_one_scenario() (absent on invalid_author rows).

evidence.description: Free-form diagnostic bundle, shape varies by how the row ended: {final_url, last_result, note} on a normal run_one_scenario() row (note may be null), {note} on an invalid_author row, or {error} on a harness_error row from the outer exception handler.

checks.description: Per-check results from evaluate_checks(), one entry per scenario success-check plus, when applicable, one appended min_steps_executed entry (FIX 2). Empty on timeout/harness_error/invalid_author rows.

type.description: url_contains | text_visible | field_value | min_steps_executed | any unrecognized value passed through from a malformed scenario (evaluate_checks()'s 'unknown check type' branch).

wall_s.description: Wall-clock seconds for this one scenario, rounded to 2 decimals (run_one_scenario()'s finally block).
